catalogLine: Drew Estate Liga Privada T52 · 5½ × 42 · Corona Viva · Full · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: dark spice, leather, earth, espresso
memberBlurb: Liga power in a slimmer format — stalk-cut habano spice and espresso without committing to a 6x60. Intense special-occasion window.

catalogLine: Macanudo Emissary France · 7 × 48 · Churchill · Medium-Full · Honduras · $13 · Notes: savory tobacco, dark sweetness, spice, wood
memberBlurb: Macanudo beyond Cafe — French filler twist, broadleaf binder, and savory depth in a Churchill. Proof the brand can do medium-full.

catalogLine: La Flor Dominicana 30 Years · 6 × 54 · Chisel · Medium-Full · Dominican · $16 · Notes: pepper, earth, cedar, dark spice
memberBlurb: LFD anniversary in the signature Chisel — estate Dominican pepper and earth with craftsmanship flex. Not Double Ligero, still serious.

catalogLine: Aging Room Quattro Nicaragua Concerto Impromptu · 6 × 54 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: pepper, cinnamon, nutmeg, orange peel
memberBlurb: Spice-forward Nicaraguan puro — pepper, cinnamon, and orange peel in a box-pressed shape. For after-dinner drinkers who want complexity.

catalogLine: Davidoff Millennium Blend Series · 6½ × 52 · Piramide · Medium-Full · Dominican · $24 · Notes: cream, cedar, coffee, soft pepper
memberBlurb: Davidoff Millennium elegance with more body — cream, coffee, and floral spice in a piramide. Luxury that still drinks refined.

catalogLine: Gellis Family Cigars Saunter · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Dominican · $12 · Notes: cream, cedar, light spice, nuts
memberBlurb: Boutique medium with Warped-adjacent polish — cream, cedar, and light spice in an approachable robusto. Refined without going dark.

catalogLine: Viaje Fifteen Plus Two And A Half Anniversary Silver · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: sweet spice, cedar, citrus, earth
memberBlurb: Viaje anniversary Aganorsa puro — festive sweet spice and citrus over cedar. Celebration cigar with boutique energy.

catalogLine: Oliva Serie V Melanio Maduro · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: cocoa, dark sweetness, coffee, earth
memberBlurb: Melanio’s darker maduro side — cocoa and coffee sweetness in a polished Mexican wrapper. Bourbon-friendly without Serie V bite.

catalogLine: Sancho Panza Belicoso · 6 × 52 · Belicoso · Full · Cuban · — · Notes: cedar, wood, earth, spice
memberBlurb: Off-the-beaten-path Cuban belicoso — cedar, wood, and assertive island strength. For experienced smokers exploring beyond the big names.
priceNote: Island Cuban; not U.S. retail MSRP.

catalogLine: OneOff Black · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: savory spice, earth, cocoa, cedar
memberBlurb: Restored cult-brand toro — savory Aganorsa earth and cocoa with Illusione/Giolito pedigree. Boutique story plus modern execution.

catalogLine: C.L.E. Maduro 50x5 · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Full · Honduras · $10 · Notes: dark cocoa, earth, spice, roasted nuts
memberBlurb: Eiroa family full maduro — dark cocoa, pepper, and Honduran identity in a 50x5 robusto. Strong after-dinner without boutique pricing.

catalogLine: Foundation Cigar Company Olmec Maduro · 6 × 60 · Grande · Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: cocoa, earth, espresso, molasses
memberBlurb: Foundation San Andrés statement in a 60-ring grande — cocoa, espresso, and long-session body. Winter smoke; plan two hours.

catalogLine: La Aroma de Cuba Original · 5 × 52 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $9 · Notes: roasted peanut, toasted chestnut, coffee, cocoa
memberBlurb: My Father-made broadleaf value bomb — roasted nuts, coffee, and pepper in a classic robusto. Strong flavor without boutique sticker shock.

catalogLine: La Aurora Family Creed Series Fuerte Sol · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium-Full · Dominican · $12 · Notes: savory spice, earth, cocoa, leather
memberBlurb: Modern La Aurora — Mexican wrapper richness over a multinational filler stack. Heritage brand with rum-friendly savory depth.

catalogLine: Aladino 85 Aniversario Reserva · 6 × 50 · Toro · Medium · Honduras · $15 · Notes: cedar, wood, spice, earth
memberBlurb: Honduran puro anniversary — Corojo-seed cedar and wood in a reserve toro. Eiroa heritage for Scotch and celebration nights.

catalogLine: My Father The Judge Grand Robusto · 6 × 60 · Grand Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $18 · Notes: cocoa, coffee, earth, dark sweetness
memberBlurb: 2024 Cigar of the Year — Pepín Garcia family story in a 60-ring grand robusto. Cocoa, leather, and layered Nicaraguan power built for cognac nights.

catalogLine: Montecristo 1935 Anniversary Nicaragua Espeso · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $16 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, sweet tobacco, toast
memberBlurb: Montecristo’s Nicaraguan anniversary line — polished spice and cedar over modern Nicaraguan body. Espeso format smokes richer than a standard toro.

catalogLine: E.P. Carrillo Encore Celestial · 6¼ × 54 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $15 · Notes: cedar, wood, earth, leather
memberBlurb: E.P. Carrillo’s encore act — woody sweetness and baking spice in a long Celestial format. Celebration cigar with boutique pedigree.

catalogLine: Padron Serie 1926 No. 6 · 4¾ × 50 · Robusto · Full · Nicaragua · $22 · Notes: cocoa, coffee, earth, dark sweetness
memberBlurb: Short 1926 format with full Padron cocoa-coffee DNA — dense flavor in under an hour. Collector 1926 without committing to a double corona.

catalogLine: Partagás Línea Maestra Maestro · 5⅛ × 52 · Robusto · Full · Cuban · — · Notes: cedar, wood, earth, leather
memberBlurb: Cuban ultra-premium Maestra tier — assertive island cedar and earth. Recommend only when Cuban prestige and rarity are explicit.
priceNote: Island Cuban; not U.S. retail MSRP.

catalogLine: Oliva Serie V Melanio Maduro · 6½ × 52 · Torpedo · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $12 · Notes: cocoa, earth, pepper, espresso
memberBlurb: Melanio maduro in torpedo — longer, tapered draw concentrates Mexican wrapper cocoa and coffee. Different experience than the 5×50 robusto on the 2025 list.
sizeNote: Same line as CA25-18 Robusto; different vitola (torpedo vs robusto).

catalogLine: Rocky Patel Conviction · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $14 · Notes: earth, savory spice, cedar, cocoa
memberBlurb: Rocky Patel’s conviction line — savory Nicaraguan spice and cedar in a classic toro. Modern RP without the heaviest broadleaf bomb.

catalogLine: Cohiba Maduro 5 Mágicos · 4½ × 52 · Petit Robusto · Medium-Full · Cuban · — · Notes: cocoa, earth, pepper, espresso
memberBlurb: Cuban Cohiba maduro in a short magico — dark sweetness and luxury aroma in a 4½-inch format. Island-only prestige.
priceNote: Island Cuban; not U.S. retail MSRP.

catalogLine: Arturo Fuente Don Carlos Eye of the Bull · 6¼ × 54 · Toro · Medium-Full · Dominican · $16 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, sweet tobacco, toast
memberBlurb: Don Carlos Eye of the Bull — Cameroon wrapper elegance over Fuente Dominican core. Special-occasion Fuente without OpusX scarcity.

catalogLine: Brick House · 7 × 50 · Churchill · Medium · Nicaragua · $7 · Notes: earth, savory spice, cedar, cocoa
memberBlurb: J.C. Newman value Churchill — Brazilian wrapper savory depth at everyday pricing. Long lunch smoke that punches above its MSRP.

catalogLine: La Aroma de Cuba Pasión Box-Pressed Torpedo · 6⅛ × 52 · Torpedo · Full · Nicaragua · $10 · Notes: cocoa, coffee, earth, dark sweetness
memberBlurb: My Father-made Pasión — box-pressed torpedo with coffee, cocoa, and pepper. Richer and more modern than La Aroma Original.
sizeNote: Pasión line; CA25-23 is Original Robusto — different blend.

catalogLine: Aksum Claro · 5 × 50 · Robusto · Medium · Nicaragua · $11 · Notes: cream, cedar, nuts, toast
memberBlurb: Boutique claro surprise — Ecuador wrapper cream and gentle spice. Top 25 proof that medium body can still feel premium.

catalogLine: Viva La Vida Jester · 6 × 52 · Toro · Medium-Full · Nicaragua · $13 · Notes: cedar, baking spice, sweet tobacco, toast
memberBlurb: Aganorsa-forward boutique — sweet spice and rum-friendly depth in the Jester vitola. Story-driven Nicaraguan with modern polish.
